panels.title: Dropped flows by reason
panels.description: Cilium policy verdicts, kept for history and alerting (Hubble UI shows live drops interactively but keeps no history). POLICY_DENIED here means a NetworkPolicy is blocking a flow someone expected to work.

panels.title: Dropped flows by source → destination
panels.description: sourceContext/destinationContext=workload render as a combined '<namespace>/<workload>' label, so temporal-frontend and temporal-history stay distinct instead of collapsing into one 'temporal' series.

panels.title: Total drops by protocol
panels.description: A sudden ICMP or TCP drop spike after a policy change is the signature of the default-deny regressions this repo has hit before.
